productDisplayName: Fabindia Women Printed Beige Ghicha Silk Wrap Top
description: Style NoteThis feminine wrap top with pretty fastenings by fabindia is a perfect top to wear with your favourite jeans, or as a useful top layer over ethnic ensembles. Ghicha silk has a unique, slightly rough, texture - and when combined with the charming imperfections of the block printing (which has all been done by hand) and the fashionable cut, the end result is a one-of-a-kind piece which is sure to become a well-loved favourite. So go all out and make an Indo-Western statement by pairing this top with simple form fitting denims and sandals.Product DetailsBeige and black printed wrap top made of ghicha silk, has three quarter sleeves, mandarin collar, wrap around fastenings with a sash, a vented hem and vented cuffsMaterial and CareGhicha silkDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33”) is wearing a size S
